headline: Ten Toes Launches Ten Beat, Sport's First Million-persona Intelligence Platform
summary: NEW YORK, May 14, 2026--Ten Toes, the sports marketing agency behind work for FIFA, The FA, Matchroom, Nike, Harry Kane, Ferrero, and Visa, today launches Ten Beat, sport's first million-persona intelligence platform.

raw.headline: Ten Toes Launches Ten Beat, Sport's First Million-persona Intelligence Platform

headline: Expect Fed to lower rates in next three months, says Piper Sandler's Michael Kantrowitz
summary: Michael Kantrowitz, Piper Sandler chief investment strategist, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss market resilience to recent macro headwinds, predictions on moves out of the Federal Reserve, recent economic data, and more.

raw.headline: Expect Fed to lower rates in next three months, says Piper Sandler's Michael Kantrowitz
raw.summary: Michael Kantrowitz, Piper Sandler chief investment strategist, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss market resilience to recent macro headwinds, predictions on moves out of the Federal Reserve, recent economic data, and more.

headline: Job-hopping is now the fastest path to becoming a CEO—and company loyalty may actually hold you back
summary: A ‘boundaryless career’ is now the most reliable way to a corner office, a sign of how much employers have changed their tune on company loyalty.

raw.headline: Job-hopping is now the fastest path to becoming a CEO—and company loyalty may actually hold you back
raw.summary: A ‘boundaryless career’ is now the most reliable way to a corner office, a sign of how much employers have changed their tune on company loyalty.

headline: Mark Kelly Says Americans Paid 'Price' For Trump Admin's 'Chaotic' Tariff Policy And Savings Should Go Back To Them As Nike Faces Class Action Suit
summary: Political pressure is building for consumer rebates after Sen. Mark Kelly (D-Ariz.) on Wednesday accused the administration's tariff policy of raising costs for households while allowing major corporations to retain the financial benefits. In a post on X, Kelly said, "Americans have paid the real price of this administration’s chaotic tariff policy. headline: Wells Fargo Lowers Nike (NKE) Rating as Global Turnaround Takes Longer Than Expected
summary: NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy Now for a $1 Million Portfolio. On May 8, Wells Fargo downgraded NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) to Equal Weight from Overweight and lowered its price target to $45 from $55. The firm said Nike no longer fits with its view that clothing companies are […]
